name: Offer-in-Compromise (OIC)

eligibility.description: Taxpayers must demonstrate an inability to pay the full amount or show that full payment would cause economic hardship; requires submission of Form 656 and financial disclosures.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows a taxpayer to settle their tax liabilities for less than the full amount owed based on doubt as to collectibility, doubt as to liability, or effective tax administration.
